name: neptranslate-gold
description: High-quality low-quantity gold standard for NepTranslate (~100 samples per class).
language_rationale: NPHC 2021: Nepali ~44.9% L1 + large L2 base (~90% access). Maithili/Bhojpuri later.
seed_sources: IN22-Conv npi_Deva (CC-BY-4.0, attribution) — seed only, re-translate for register
FLORES+ npi_Deva (CC-BY-SA) — seed English prompts only when re-licensed/hand-rewritten for holdout
curation_rules: Two native Nepali reviewers; reject pronoun/verb honorific mismatch
Formal: तपाईं + matching verb forms (गर्नुहुन्छ, दिनुहोस्, …)
Informal: तिमी + matching verb forms (गर्छौ, देऊ, …); keep तँ out of informal class unless labeled low
Roman class: natural chat romanization paired with Devanagari + English
Do not train on this set; freeze before shipping models

licenses.in22_seed: CC-BY-4.0 attribution if retaining IN22 text
